title: NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT EAST COUNTY HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program that supports pregnant people from early pregnancy through their child’s second birthday, pairing new parents with a specially trained nurse for support, advice and resource connection. Nurses provide health and developmental screenings to identify potential problems with growth, hearing, social-emotional development, oral health, and other issues. Offers breastfeeding support, parenting support, and general parenting education. 600 NE 8th Street 3rd Floor Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: First-time birthing parent with a household income below 185% Federal Poverty Level, must enroll prior to the 29th week of pregnancy Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 988-3520 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 988-5558 Main phone Main phone (503) 988-3520 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 1, 4, 9, 25, 26, 80; MAX Blue Line to Gresham Central Transit Center Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance Prenatal/Postnatal Home Visitation Programs Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE CLINICS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT EAST COUNTY HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL
